description: Story Video Workflow configuration template - optional at runtime

notes.usage: Copy this file and modify parameters, then pass via --config parameter when running workflow
notes.example: python story_video_workflow_langgraph.py --config my_config.json --story 'Once upon a time...' --task-path task_data/my_story
notes.optional: If no configuration file is provided, all parameters will use default values
notes.duration_calculation: target_duration (60s) ÷ video clip duration (8s) = ~7-8 clips. Adjust target_duration to control total video length.
